input: domain knowledge graph (with prerequisite and semantic relations), learner interaction history, resource-to-knowledge mapping
backbone: knowledge graph + deep reinforcement learning (Q-learning + PPO)
loss: reinforcement learning reward (cumulative return) + PPO policy loss
key_idea: prune-then-select workflow: Q-learning prunes prerequisite-feasible candidates, then PPO selects the final action from the pruned set
datasets: real-world WeChat Mini Program data (200 learners, 18,742 interactions)
